## [BetterFolders](https://betterdiscord.app/plugin/BetterFolders) <sub><sup>`v3.8.1` _(Updated: 2026-02-14)_</sup></sub>

Adds new functionality to server folders. Custom Folder Icons. Close other folders on open.

## [BetterVolume](https://betterdiscord.app/plugin/BetterVolume) <sub><sup>`v3.2.4` _(Updated: 2026-05-02)_</sup></sub>

Set user volume values manually instead of using a slider. Allows setting volumes higher than 200%.

## [CollapseEmbeds](https://betterdiscord.app/plugin/CollapseEmbeds) <sub><sup>`v2.2.0` _(Updated: 2026-05-02)_</sup></sub>

Adds a button to collapse embeds & attachments.

## [OnlineFriendCount](https://betterdiscord.app/plugin/OnlineFriendCount) <sub><sup>`v3.3.2` _(Updated: 2026-05-02)_</sup></sub>

Adds the old online friend count and similar counters back to server list. Because nostalgia.

## [VoiceEvents](https://betterdiscord.app/plugin/VoiceEvents) <sub><sup>`v2.8.5` _(Updated: 2026-05-05)_</sup></sub>

Adds TTS Event Notifications to your selected Voice Channel. TeamSpeak feeling.
